descriptionShort: Moncton and Maine junior hockey game recap with penalty details and scoring summary.
descriptionLong: Maine's goalie Bill Ranford allowed three early goals but the team rallied to defeat Moncton 5-3. Moncton defenseman Matt Hervey received multiple penalties including a slashing minor, unsportsmanlike conduct, and 10-minute misconduct for arguing with referee Mike North. A goal was scored by Pasin deflecting Gordie Hynes' wrist shot while Hervey was in the penalty box.
